name: infracost
description: MCP server for Infracost CLI integration
author: Carl Dawson

tools.name: infracost_breakdown
tools.description: Generate cost breakdown for Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, etc.)

tools.name: infracost_diff
tools.description: Show cost diff between current IaC and planned changes

tools.name: infracost_output
tools.description: Format Infracost JSON output to different formats (table, html, comments, etc.)

tools.name: infracost_comment
tools.description: Post cost estimate comments to pull requests (GitHub, GitLab, Azure Repos, Bitbucket)

tools.name: infracost_upload
tools.description: Upload Infracost JSON to Infracost Cloud for centralized visibility

tools.name: infracost_configure
tools.description: Get or set Infracost configuration options

tools.name: infracost_generate_usage
tools.description: Generate Infracost usage file with sensible defaults for resource types
